title: General Affidavit
template: I, {{fullName}}, residing at {{address}}, do hereby solemnly affirm and declare that the statements made herein are true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief.

title: Name Change Affidavit
template: I, {{oldName}}, have changed my name to {{newName}} and shall hereafter be known as {{newName}} for all legal purposes.

title: Address Proof Affidavit
template: I, {{fullName}}, certify that my permanent address is {{address}}.

title: Birth Affidavit
template: I hereby affirm that {{personName}} was born on {{dob}} at {{birthPlace}}.

title: Marriage Affidavit
template: I hereby declare that I am legally married to {{spouseName}} on {{marriageDate}}.

title: Income Affidavit
template: I declare that my monthly income is {{income}} and this statement is true.

title: Lost Passport Affidavit
template: I declare that my passport bearing number {{passportNumber}} has been lost on {{lossDate}}.

title: Lost Driving Licence Affidavit
template: I declare that my driving licence number {{licenseNumber}} has been lost.

title: Employment Letter
template: This is to certify that {{employeeName}} is employed with {{companyName}} as {{designation}}.

title: Salary Certificate
template: This certifies that {{employeeName}} receives a monthly salary of {{salary}}.

title: No Objection Certificate
template: This is to certify that we have no objection to {{personName}} for {{purpose}}.

title: Legal Notice
template: This legal notice is issued to {{recipientName}} regarding {{subject}}.
